name: python3-altgraph
title: python3-altgraph
description:
Python 3 graph (network) package
altgraph is a fork of graphlib: a graph (network) package for constructing
graphs, BFS and DFS traversals, topological sort, shortest paths, etc. with
graphviz output.
.
altgraph includes enhancements related to modulegraph and macholib.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-altgraph because Python 3 graph (network) package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-altgraph as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-altgraph with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-altgraph --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
